front: Gostaria de agendar uma reunião para discutirmos os detalhes da proposta.
pronunciation: gohs-tah-REE-ah jee ah-zhehn-DAHR OO-mah rrehoo-nee-ONG PAH-rah dees-koo-TEE-mooz ohz deh-TAH-lyees dah proh-POHS-tah.
back: I would like to schedule a meeting to discuss the details of the proposal.
context: A classic, polite email opening or verbal request to set up a meeting.

front: Agradeço a oportunidade e o seu tempo durante a entrevista de hoje.
pronunciation: ah-grah-DEH-soo ah oh-pohr-too-nee-DAH-jee ee oh SEH-oo TEHM-poo doo-RAHN-tee ah een-treh-VEES-tah jee HOY-zhee.
back: Thank you for the opportunity and your time during today's interview.
context: An excellent follow-up line to send via email after a job interview.

front: Estou anexando o relatório de desempenho do último trimestre para sua análise.
pronunciation: ees-TOY ah-neh-KSAHN-doh oh rreh-lah-TOH-ryoh jee deh-zehm-PEH-nyoh doh OOL-tee-moo tree-MEHS-tree PAH-rah SOO-ah ah-NAH-lee-zee.
back: I am attaching the performance report from the last quarter for your review.
context: Standard corporate email phrasing when sharing attachments.

front: Precisamos definir as prioridades do projeto para evitar atrasos na entrega.
pronunciation: pree-see-ZAH-mohz deh-fee-NEER ahz pree-oh-ree-DAH-deez doh proh-ZHEH-toh PAH-rah ee-vee-TAHR ah-TRAH-zooz nah een-TREH-gah.
back: We need to define the project priorities to avoid delivery delays.
context: Used in team alignment meetings to keep a project on schedule.

front: Fico à disposição para esclarecer qualquer dúvida sobre o contrato.
pronunciation: FEE-koo ah dees-poh-zee-ZOHNG PAH-rah ees-klah-reh-SEHR kwahl-KEHR DOO-vee-dah SOH-bree oh kohn-TRAH-toh.
back: I remain at your disposal to clarify any questions regarding the contract.
context: A professional sign-off for emails during legal or commercial negotiations.

front: Quais são as principais metas e desafios deste departamento para o próximo ano?
pronunciation: kwah-eez SOHNG ahz preen-see-PAH-eez MEH-tahz ee deh-zah-FEE-ohz DEHS-tee deh-pahr-tah-MEHN-toh PAH-rah oh PROH-ksee-moo AH-noo?
back: What are the main goals and challenges of this department for the next year?
context: A smart, active question to ask the interviewer at the end of a job interview.

front: Acredito que minhas experiências anteriores se alinham perfeitamente com a vaga.
pronunciation: ah-kreh-DEE-toh keh MEENG-yahs ees-peh-ree-EHN-see-ahz ahn-teh-ree-OH-reez see ah-LEENG-yahm pehr-fay-tah-MEHN-tee kohm ah VAH-gah.
back: I believe my previous experiences align perfectly with the vacancy.
context: Selling your skillset during an interview or in a cover letter.

front: Por favor, me avise se precisar de mais alguma informação adicional.
pronunciation: pohr fah-VOHR, mee ah-VEE-zee see pree-see-ZAHR jee MAHEES ahl-GOO-mah een-fohr-mah-ZOHNG ah-dee-see-oh-NAHL.
back: Please let me know if you need any additional information.
context: A polite, standard way to conclude business inquiries or administrative emails.

front: Vamos iniciar a apresentação revisando os resultados do ano passado.
pronunciation: VAH-mohz ee-nee-see-AHR ah ah-preh-zehn-tah-ZOHNG rreh-vee-ZAHN-doh ohz rreh-zool-TAH-dohz doh AH-noo pah-SAH-doh.
back: Let's start the presentation by reviewing last year's results.
context: Setting the stage when presenting to clients, stakeholders, or teams.

front: Precisamos chegar a um acordo que seja benéfico para ambas as partes.
pronunciation: pree-see-ZAH-mohz sheh-GAHR ah oong ah-KOHR-doh keh ZAY-zhah beh-neh-FEE-see-oo PAH-rah AM-bahz ahz PAHR-teez.
back: We need to reach an agreement that is beneficial to both parties.
context: Standard win-win rhetoric used in corporate or client negotiations.

front: Peço desculpas pelo transtorno e agradeço pela sua paciência.
pronunciation: PEH-soo dees-KOOL-pahz PEH-loo trans-TOHR-noo ee ah-grah-DEH-soo PEH-lah SOO-ah pah-see-EHN-see-ah.
back: I apologize for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience.
context: Customer support or service delivery phrase used when resolving an issue.

front: Qual é o prazo limite para o envio do feedback sobre o projeto?
pronunciation: kwahl eh oh PRAH-zoo lee-MEE-tee PAH-rah oh een-VEE-oo doh feed-BEHK SOH-bree oh proh-ZHEH-toh?
back: What is the deadline for submitting feedback on the project?
context: Clarifying project milestones and communication timelines.

front: Estou muito motivado com a possibilidade de fazer parte da equipe.
pronunciation: ees-TOY MWEE-too moh-tee-VAH-doh kohm ah poh-see-bee-lee-DAH-jee jee fah-ZEHR PAHR-tee dah ee-KEE-pee.
back: I am very motivated by the possibility of joining the team.
context: Expressing enthusiasm in interviews. Female speakers use 'motivada'.

front: Podemos alinhar nossas expectativas sobre o orçamento na próxima semana.
pronunciation: poh-DEH-mohz ah-leeng-YAHR NOHS-sahz ees-pek-tah-TEE-vahz SOH-bree oh ohr-sah-MEHN-toh nah PROH-ksee-mah seh-MAH-nah.
back: We can align our expectations regarding the budget next week.
context: Discussing financial frameworks with clients or managers.

front: Encaminhei o e-mail original com todos os detalhes técnicos em anexo.
pronunciation: eeng-kah-meeng-YAY oh ee-MAY-oo oh-ree-zhee-NAHL kohm TOH-doohz ohz deh-TAH-lyees TEK-nee-koohz eheng ah-NEH-ksoo.
back: I forwarded the original email with all the technical details attached.
context: Explaining email history and technical references to colleagues.

front: Como vocês avaliam o sucesso de um funcionário nesta posição?
pronunciation: KOH-moo voh-SEHZ ah-vah-LEE-ahm oh soo-SEH-soo jee oong foon-see-oh-NAH-ryoo NEHS-tah poh-zee-ZOHNG?
back: How do you evaluate the success of an employee in this position?
context: A classic interview question to understand key performance indicators (KPIs).

front: A pauta da nossa reunião de hoje foca na otimização de processos.
pronunciation: ah PAH-oo-tah dah NOHS-sah rrehoo-nee-ONG jee HOY-zhee FOH-kah nah oh-tee-mee-zah-ZOHNG jee proh-SEH-sooz.
back: The agenda for our meeting today focuses on process optimization.
context: Opening a structured department alignment meeting.

front: É fundamental manter a transparência durante todo o processo de negociação.
pronunciation: eh foon-dah-mehn-TAHL man-TEHR ah trans-pah-REHN-see-ah doo-RAHN-tee TOH-doh oh proh-SEH-soo jee neh-goh-see-ah-ZOHNG.
back: It is fundamental to maintain transparency throughout the negotiation process.
context: Establishing trust in complex commercial agreements.

front: Gostaria de sugerir uma alternativa mais econômica para este fornecedor.
pronunciation: gohs-tah-REE-ah jee soo-zheh-REER OO-mah ahl-tehr-nah-TEE-vah MAHEES eh-koh-NOH-mee-kah PAH-rah EHS-tee fohr-neh-seh-DOHR.
back: I would like to suggest a more economical alternative to this supplier.
context: Proposing cost-saving solutions in operations.

front: Aguardo seu retorno para podermos dar andamento ao processo de contratação.
pronunciation: ah-GWAHR-doh SEH-oo rreh-TOHR-noo PAH-rah poh-DEHR-mohz DAHR ahn-dah-MEHN-toh AH-oo proh-SEH-soo jee kohn-trah-tah-ZOHNG.
back: I await your reply so we can move forward with the hiring process.
context: Polite call-to-action closure for recruitment communications.

front: Gostaria de destacar meu papel na liderança de projetos de tecnologia.
pronunciation: gohs-tah-REE-ah jee des-tah-KAHR MEH-oo pah-PEHL nah lee-deh-RAHN-sah jee proh-ZHEH-tohz jee tek-noh-loh-ZHEE-ah.
back: I would like to highlight my role in leading technology projects.
context: Summarizing personal leadership achievements on a resume or interview.

front: Essa estratégia de marketing nos ajudará a expandir nossa base de clientes.
pronunciation: EHS-sah ees-trah-TEH-zhah jee MAHR-keh-teeng nohz ah-zhoo-dah-RAH ah ees-pahn-DEER NOHS-sah BAH-zee jee klee-EHN-teez.
back: This marketing strategy will help us expand our customer base.
context: Presenting growth plans to stakeholders or directors.

front: Podemos marcar um alinhamento rápido de dez minutos antes do almoço?
pronunciation: poh-DEH-mohz mahr-KAHR oong ah-leeng-yah-MEHN-toh RRAH-pee-doh jee DEHS mee-NOO-tooz AHN-teez doh ahl-MOH-soo?
back: Can we schedule a quick ten-minute alignment before lunch?
context: Asking a colleague for a brief syncing session (synonymous with 'sync' or 'standup').

front: Agradeço pelo feedback construtivo e vou trabalhar nos pontos de melhoria.
pronunciation: ah-grah-DEH-soo PEH-loo feed-BEHK kohn-stroo-TEE-voh ee VOY trah-bah-LYAHR nohz POHN-toohz jee meh-lyoh-REE-ah.
back: Thank you for the constructive feedback, and I will work on the areas for improvement.
context: A mature, professional response to performance evaluations.

front: Escrevo para confirmar o recebimento dos documentos assinados.
pronunciation: ees-KREH-voo PAH-rah kohn-feer-MAHR oh rreh-seh-bee-MEHN-toh dohz doh-koo-MEHN-toohz ah-see-NAH-doohz.
back: I am writing to confirm receipt of the signed documents.
context: Formal confirmation email sent to business partners or administration.

front: Nossa equipe está focada em entregar a melhor experiência de usuário.
pronunciation: NOHS-sah ee-KEE-pee ees-TAH foh-KAH-dah eheng een-treh-GAHR ah meh-LYOHR ees-peh-ree-EHN-see-ah jee oo-zoo-AH-ryoo.
back: Our team is focused on delivering the best user experience.
context: Stating product-centric priorities in client or internal meetings.

front: Minha pretensão salarial é compatível com a média de mercado para o cargo.
pronunciation: MEENG-yah preh-tehn-ZOHNG sah-lah-RYAHL eh kohm-pah-TEE-vehl kohm ah MEH-dyah jee mehr-KAH-doh PAH-rah oh KAHR-goo.
back: My salary expectation is compatible with the market average for this role.
context: Answering salary negotiation questions tactfully.

front: Precisamos otimizar nossos custos sem comprometer a qualidade do serviço.
pronunciation: pree-see-ZAH-mohz oh-tee-mee-ZAHR NOHS-sohz KOOS-toohz SEHNG kohm-proh-meh-TEHR ah kwah-lee-DAH-jee doh sehr-VEE-soo.
back: We need to optimize our costs without compromising service quality.
context: Discussing budget constraints in business strategy sessions.

front: Gostaria de propor um cronograma de entregas faseado para este semestre.
pronunciation: gohs-tah-REE-ah jee proh-POHR oong kroh-noh-GRAH-mah jee een-TREH-gahz fah-zeh-AH-doh PAH-rah EHS-tee seh-MEHS-tree.
back: I would like to propose a phased delivery schedule for this semester.
context: Suggesting milestone-based project roadmaps to a client.

front: Fico feliz em informar que batemos nossa meta de vendas deste mês.
pronunciation: FEE-koo feh-LEEZ eheng een-fohr-MAHR keh bah-TEH-mohz NOHS-sah MEH-tah jee VEHN-dahz DEHS-tee MEHS.
back: I am happy to inform you that we reached our sales target for this month.
context: Sharing positive department or company-wide achievements.

front: Vou centralizar as informações na planilha compartilhada para evitar ruídos.
pronunciation: VOY sehn-trah-lee-ZAHR ahz een-fohr-mah-SOHNGZ nah plah-NEEL-yah kohm-pahr-teel-YAH-dah PAH-rah ee-vee-TAHR rroo-EE-doohz.
back: I will centralize the information in the shared spreadsheet to avoid miscommunication.
context: Organizing workflow structures; 'ruído' literally means noise, contextually 'miscommunication'.

front: Você poderia me enviar a ata da reunião de ontem, por favor?
pronunciation: voh-SEH poh-deh-REE-ah mee een-vee-AHR ah AH-tah dah rrehoo-nee-ONG jee OHN-tehng, pohr fah-VOHR?
back: Could you send me the minutes of yesterday's meeting, please?
context: Asking administrative staff or colleagues for official summaries ('ata' = minutes).

front: Vejo essa transição de carreira como uma grande oportunidade de aprendizado.
pronunciation: VEH-zhoo EHS-sah tran-see-ZOHNG jee kahr-REH-ee-rah KOH-moo OO-mah GRAN-jee oh-pohr-too-nee-DAH-jee jee ah-prehn-dee-ZAH-doh.
back: I see this career transition as a great learning opportunity.
context: Explaining career pivots positively in screening interviews.

front: É crucial alinhar o escopo do projeto antes de assinar o contrato final.
pronunciation: eh kroo-see-AHL ah-leeng-YAHR oh ees-KOH-poo doh proh-ZHEH-toh AHN-teez jee ah-see-NAHR oh kohn-TRAH-toh fee-NAHL.
back: It is crucial to align the project scope before signing the final contract.
context: A warning or structural advice during procurement or service deals.

front: Peço que me mantenha em cópia em todas as comunicações com o cliente.
pronunciation: PEH-soo keh mee man-TEHNG-yah eheng KOH-pyah eheng TOH-dahz ahz koh-moo-nee-kah-SOHNGZ kohm oh klee-EHN-tee.
back: Please keep me cc'd on all communications with the client.
context: A request made by managers or team leads to monitor workflow.

front: Quais são os pontos fracos que a empresa está tentando corrigir atualmente?
pronunciation: kwah-eez SOHNG ohz POHN-toohz FRAH-koohz keh ah ehm-PREH-zah ees-TAH tehn-TAHN-doh kohr-ree-ZHEER ah-twahl-MEHN-tee?
back: What are the weaknesses that the company is currently trying to correct?
context: An insightful question to probe deeper into company realities during an interview.

front: Essa abordagem inovadora trará um diferencial competitivo importante.
pronunciation: EHS-sah ah-bohr-DAH-zhehm ee-noh-vah-DOH-rah trah-RAH oong dee-feh-rehn-see-AHL kohn-peh-tee-TEE-voh eem-pohr-TAHN-tee.
back: This innovative approach will bring an important competitive edge.
context: Presenting product or services pitches to prospective clients.

front: Infelizmente, teremos que adiar o lançamento devido a problemas técnicos.
pronunciation: een-fee-LEEZ-mehn-tee, teh-REH-mohz keh ah-dee-AHR oh lan-sah-MEHN-toh deh-VEE-doh ah proh-BLEH-mahz TEK-nee-koohz.
back: Unfortunately, we will have to postpone the launch due to technical issues.
context: Delivering delay notices in internal or client-facing operations.

front: Estou pronto para assumir novas responsabilidades e liderar iniciativas.
pronunciation: ees-TOY PROHN-too PAH-rah ah-soo-MEER NOH-vahz rres-pohn-sah-bee-lee-DAH-deez ee lee-deh-RAHR ee-nee-see-ah-TEE-vahz.
back: I am ready to take on new responsibilities and lead initiatives.
context: Demonstrating drive in career growth interviews. Females use 'pronta'.

front: Gostaria de solicitar uma prorrogação de dois dias para revisar o relatório.
pronunciation: gohs-tah-REE-ah jee soh-lee-see-TAHR OO-mah proh-rroh-gah-ZOHNG jee doyz DEE-ahz PAH-rah rreh-vee-ZAHR oh rreh-lah-TOH-ryoo.
back: I would like to request a two-day extension to review the report.
context: A polite formal email request asking for extended deadlines.

front: Sua sugestão foi excelente e já foi implementada no fluxo de trabalho.
pronunciation: SOO-ah soo-zhes-TOHNG foi eh-sheh-LEHN-tee ee ZHAH foi eem-pleh-mehn-TAH-dah noo FLOO-ksoo jee trah-BAH-lyoo.
back: Your suggestion was excellent and has already been implemented in the workflow.
context: Validating and acknowledging a team member's operational contribution.

front: O foco principal da nossa campanha publicitária é o público jovem.
pronunciation: oh FOH-koo preen-see-PAHL dah NOHS-sah kam-PAHN-yah poo-blee-see-TAH-ryah eh oh POO-blee-koh ZHOH-vehm.
back: The main focus of our advertising campaign is the young audience.
context: Discussing target markets in sales or marketing strategizing.

front: Temos que analisar os riscos antes de investir nesse novo mercado.
pronunciation: TEH-mohz keh ah-nah-lee-ZAHR ohz REES-kooz AHN-teez jee een-ves-TEER NEHS-see NOH-voo mehr-KAH-doh.
back: We must analyze the risks before investing in this new market.
context: Stating cautious, analysis-driven approaches to corporate expansion.

front: Muito obrigado pela parceria de sucesso ao longo de todo este ano.
pronunciation: MWEE-too oh-bree-GAH-doh PEH-lah pahr-seh-REE-ah jee soo-SEH-soo AH-oo LOONG-goo jee TOH-doh EHS-tee AH-noo.
back: Thank you very much for the successful partnership throughout this year.
context: Expressing gratitude to long-term clients or business partners.

front: Envie-me um convite de calendário com o link da videoconferência.
pronunciation: eheng-VEE-ee-mee oong kohn-VEE-tee jee kah-lehn-DAH-ryoo kohm oh LEENG-kee dah vee-jee-oh-kohn-feh-REHN-see-ah.
back: Send me a calendar invitation with the video conference link.
context: Practical request sent to schedule online remote interactions.
